prompt: 请执行一次 Phase 32 Windows Computer Use 只读 native helper 验收：只使用静态窗口、fake native provider 和临时 evidence 目录，验证 WindowsNativeWindowObservationHelper 合同、截图 artifact 落盘、文本脱敏、helper 状态和 native helper opt-in 门禁，不要读取真实桌面，不要移动鼠标，不要点击真实桌面，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_READY。 你必须调用终端工具执行这个安全命令验证协议：$env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "import json, tempfile; from pathlib import Path; from learning_agent.computer_use.controller import COMPUTER_USE_NATIVE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR, COMPUTER_USE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR, ComputerUseController, WindowsComputerUseBackend, build_default_computer_use_backend; from learning_agent.computer_use.evidence import ComputerUseEvidenceStore; from learning_agent.computer_use.native_helper import NativeWindowCaptureResult, NativeWindowTextResult, WindowsNativeWindowObservationHelper, parse_hwnd_from_window; from learning_agent.computer_use.windows_backend import StaticWindowsWindowInventory; FakeCapture=type('FakeCapture',(object,),{'status':lambda self:{'backend':'visible_fake_capture','available':True,'reason':'visible acceptance capture'},'capture_window':lambda self,hwnd:NativeWindowCaptureResult(captured=True,screenshot_bytes=b'phase32-visible-bmp',screenshot_format='bmp',screenshot_width=222,screenshot_height=111,backend='visible_fake_capture',reason='captured '+str(hwnd))}); FakeText=type('FakeText',(object,),{'status':lambda self:{'backend':'visible_fake_text','available':True,'reason':'visible acceptance text'},'read_window_text':lambda self,hwnd:NativeWindowTextResult(captured=True,accessibility_text='标题 安全文本\npassword: hidden\n按钮 确定',focused_element='edit '+str(hwnd),selected_text='安全选择',document_text='安全文档',backend='visible_fake_text',reason='text '+str(hwnd))}); temp=tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(); root=Path(temp.name); raw=[{'hwnd':3201,'pid':100,'process_name':'notepad.exe','class_name':'Notepad','title':'Phase32 Notepad','rect':{'left':50,'top':60,'right':350,'bottom':260}}]; helper=WindowsNativeWindowObservationHelper(capture_provider=FakeCapture(), text_provider=FakeText(), platform='win32'); inventory=StaticWindowsWindowInventory(raw_windows=raw, captured_at='2026-06-03T00:00:00Z'); store=ComputerUseEvidenceStore(evidence_root=root/'evidence'); backend=WindowsComputerUseBackend(inventory=inventory, real_actions_enabled=False, evidence_store=store, observation_helper=helper); c=ComputerUseController(backend=backend); window=c.observe({'action':'list_windows'}).data['windows'][0]; state=c.observe({'action':'get_window_state','window':window}).data['state']; metadata=json.loads(Path(state['evidence_path']).read_text(encoding='utf-8')); without_native=build_default_computer_use_backend({COMPUTER_USE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR:'1'}).status(); with_native=build_default_computer_use_backend({COMPUTER_USE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR:'1', COMPUTER_USE_NATIVE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR:'1'}).status(); screenshot=Path(state['screenshot_path']).exists(); raw_text_hidden='password' not in json.dumps(metadata, ensure_ascii=False).lower() and 'password' not in state['accessibility_excerpt'].lower(); parsed=parse_hwnd_from_window(window)==3201; helper_ok=state['helper_name']=='windows_native_observation' and state['helper_available']; optin_ok=(not without_native['observation_helper_available']) and with_native['observation_helper']=='windows_native_observation'; assert screenshot and raw_text_hidden and parsed and helper_ok and optin_ok and state['screenshot_width']==222; print('PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK screenshot='+str(screenshot).lower()+' raw_text_hidden='+str(raw_text_hidden).lower()+' helper='+state['helper_name']+' helper_available='+str(helper_ok).lower()+' optin_guard='+str(optin_ok).lower()+' parsed='+str(parsed).lower()+' width='+str(state['screenshot_width']))" 不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_READY PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK screenshot=true raw_text_hidden=true helper=windows_native_observation helper_available=true optin_guard=true parsed=true width=222

stages.name: interactive_turn

store=ComputerUseEvidenceStore(evidence_root=root/'evidence'); backend=WindowsComputerUseBackend(inventory=inventory, real_actions_enabled=False, evidence_store=store, observation_helper=helper); c=ComputerUseController(backend=backend); window=c.observe({'action':'list_windows'}).data['windows'][0]; state=c.observe({'action':'get_window_state','window':window}).data['state']; metadata=json.loads(Path(state['evidence_path']).read_text(encoding='utf-8')); without_native=build_default_computer_use_backend({COMPUTER_USE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR:'1'}).status(); with_native=build_default_computer_use_backend({COMPUTER_USE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR:'1', COMPUTER_USE_NATIVE_OBSERVE_OPT_IN_ENV_VAR:'1'}).status(); screenshot=Path(state['screenshot_path']).exists(); raw_text_hidden='password' not in json.dumps(metadata, ensure_ascii=False).lower() and 'password' not in state['accessibility_excerpt'].lower(); parsed=parse_hwnd_from_window(window)==3201; helper_ok=state['helper_name']=='windows_native_observation' and state['helper_available']; optin_ok=(not without_native['observation_helper_available']) and with_native['observation_helper']=='windows_native_observation'; assert screenshot and raw_text_hidden and parsed and helper_ok and optin_ok and state['screenshot_width']==222; print('PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK screenshot='+str(screenshot).lower()+' raw_text_hidden='+str(raw_text_hidden).lower()+' helper='+state['helper_name']+' helper_available='+str(helper_ok).lower()+' optin_guard='+str(optin_ok).lower()+' parsed='+str(parsed).lower()+' width='+str(state['screenshot_width']))" 不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_READY PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK screenshot=true raw_text_hidden=true helper=windows_native_observation helper_available=true optin_guard=true parsed=true width=222
stages.checkpoint:
Phase 32 Windows Computer Use 只读 native helper 验收已通过；命令成功输出了 PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK，且截图落盘、文本脱敏、helper 状态、窗口句柄解析与 native helper opt-in 门禁均为 true。

PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_READY PHASE32_WINDOWS_NATIVE_HELPER_OK screenshot=true raw_text_hidden=true helper=windows_native_observation helper_available=true optin_guard=true parsed=true width=222
